EULATEXT: Rights and restrictions applying to the use of this app:
CONTACTTEACHER: Please contact a course-manager or your admin to manage your platform's subscription.
GETSUB: This platform is not unlocked. Please go to the store page or contact a course manager.
PRIVACYTEXT: Our privacy policy can be found here:
PRIVACY_TEXT: Die Betreiber dieser Seiten nehmen den Schutz Ihrer persönlichen Daten sehr ernst. Wir behandeln Ihre personenbezogenen Daten vertraulich und entsprechend der gesetzlichen Datenschutzvorschriften sowie dieser Datenschutzerklärung. Die Nutzung unserer Webseite ist in der Regel ohne Angabe personenbezogener Daten möglich. Soweit auf unseren Seiten personenbezogene Daten (beispielsweise Name, Anschrift oder E-Mail-Adressen) erhoben werden, erfolgt dies, soweit möglich, stets auf freiwilliger Basis. Diese Daten werden ohne Ihre ausdrückliche Zustimmung nicht an Dritte weitergegeben. Wir weisen darauf hin, dass die Datenübertragung im Internet (z.B. bei der Kommunikation per E-Mail) Sicherheitslücken aufweisen kann. Ein lückenloser Schutz der Daten vor dem Zugriff durch Dritte ist nicht möglich.
PRIVACYALERTTEXT: You have to agree to our privacy policy in order to play MooDuell.
FINISHEDGAMESWILLBESHOWNHERE: Finished Games will be shown here
NOGAMEYET: No game yet in this category.
NOOPENGAMEYETSUB: Start new game with click on quiz beneath
NOOPENQUIZSUB: MooDuell isn't installed in any of your courses
NOUSERYET: No user yet in this category.
ERRORSTARTINGGAME: There is a problem with this game. Please try another one.
LOGOUTWITHOUTNICKNAME: Without a nickname you'll be logged out
CAMERAREQUIRED: You have not granted MooDuell access to your Camera, please change your settings to use this feature.
WRONGPASSCODE: The pin you entered was incorrect. Please try again.
PLSPAUTH: Please authenticate by entering your 4-digit pin-code.
DOYOUREALLYWANTTOGIVEUP: Do you really want to give up? The game will be lost.
YOUHAVEGIVENUP: You have given up and lost against {{username}}.
LEAVINGQUESTIONWILLCOUNTASWRONG: You have left a question without answering it. The question was counted as wrongly answered.
CLICKTOCHANGEIMAGE: Click on the image to change it
LEAVINGMOODUELLWARNING: To change the image you'll be referred to you Moodle site. Please confirm that you want to leave the MooDuell app and go to the Moodle site.
SOMETHINGWENTWRONG: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.
TIMEOUTERROR: The server takes to long to answer. Check your internet connection and try again.
HTTPERRORRESPONSE: The server is not available. Is your internet working?
INVALIDLOGIN: Invalid Login. Please change your username and/or password and try again.
INVALIDTOKEN: The user token was wrong and probably expired. You have to login again
NOUSERTOKEN: Something went wrong. You need to login again.
NOMOODUELLONMOODLEINSTANCE: MooDuell does not seem to be installed on your Moodle Instance. Contact your admin.
ADVERSARYUSERDOESNOTEXIST: Your adversary seems to be deleted from the system. Contact your admin.
NOTYOURTURN: It wasn't your turn. Please wait for your adversary.
QUESTIONALREADYANSWERED: Do you play on two devices simultaneously? The last question was already answered.
NOMOODUELLINCOURSES: There is no MooDuell quiz in any of the courses you're currently inscribed in. Please inscribe or contact your supervisor.
WRONGNUMBEROFQUESTIONS: The quiz is not playable. Please contact your teacher.
NOBASE64: This QR Code does not seem to match an existng MooDuell instance. Please try again.
SITEPOLICYNOTAGREED: Before you can play, you have to agree to the privacy policy on your moodle site.
HINTBREAKPAGE: Click on answered questions to see them again.
HINTHP0: Click on these hints to make them disappear. Swipe for the next hint.
HINTHP1: Your homescreens shows current challenges and allows you to start a new Quiz.
HINTHP2: To navigate the App you can either use the footerbar or the menu in the upper corner.
HINTHP3: Click on your name to see some statistics and settings.
HINTHP4: Go to the challenges tab to track your progress.
HINTHP5: Games are passive while you are waiting for your opponent to make his move.
HINTQP1: Swipe away text which is covering an image.
HINTQP2: Answers can be scrolled, if they are too long.
HINTQP3: If there are is more than one question possible, you have to confirm your selection with a click on the button.
PERMISSIONPUSH: Would you like MooDuell to send you pushnotifications?
SCANRESTART: An error occured, please try again.
QREXPIRED: QR Code seems to be expired, please try again.
COMPLETIONGAMESPLAYED: To complete this challenge, play {{target}} games.
COMPLETIONGAMESWON: To complete this challenge, win {{target}} games.
COMPLETIONRIGHTANSWERS: To complete this challenge, answer {{target}} questions correctly.
NOCHALLENGE: There are currently no active challenges for this quiz.
AMOUNT: Number of challenges in this quiz
STORINGPURCHASE: Please wait. Storing Purchase on server ...
SUPPORTTEXT: Encountered a problem with MooDuell? Go to our support page:
TOOMANYUSERS: Too many users. Please use the searchbar.
PLEASEUPDATE: This version of MooDuell is no longer supported.
